name: Temporary Disability Duration Post-Machine Injury

mainEntity.name: Duration of temporary total disability pay after machine fracture in Taylorsville?
mainEntity.text: Duration of temporary total disability pay after machine fracture in Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.text: 66.67% of average weekly wage until maximum medical improvement or return to work, max 52 weeks initially.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Extendable if healing slow. Physician releases trigger end. Track via insurer statements. Taylorsville claims often prolonged for fractures.[4]

description: 66.67% of average weekly wage until maximum medical improvement or return to work, max 52 weeks initially.[4]
